TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Yanping, title = Yanping, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yanping} }

S.FORM: Yanping (延平鄉, Genhe'I go) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 480.64 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 419.42 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 48.33 km²), 3,828 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,131 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,523 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 92%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Yanping ays psgayun 5 ru 11 alang. 11 alang hani ga, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas .

Yanping (延平鄉, Genhe'I go) mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 480.64 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 419.42 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 48.33 km²), 3,828 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,131 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,523 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 92%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Yanping ays psgayun 5 ru 11 alang. 11 alang hani ga, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas .
S.PHON: janpiŋ (***, ɣenħeʔi ɣo) mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu janpiŋ ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, kainis~ɕuŋan , kamis~ɕatu , kaminu , nakanu , s~ɕu nun s~ɕuŋ , βukla*u , kalis~ɕaħan , minami , *akaŋan , pas~ɕikau , talunas~ɕ .
